summary: Ian Goodfellow discusses the unexpected success of domain-to-domain translation in GANs and reflects on his career trajectory. He emphasizes his focus on developing core machine learning technologies rather than specific applications to maximize his overall impact.

principles.statement: Focus on developing core technologies rather than specific applications.
principles.rationale: Building foundational technology provides a faster and broader path to impact many different fields simultaneously, as opposed to solving isolated problems one at a time.
principles.source_quote: I realized that would be a faster path to impact more things than working on specific medical applications one at a time

principles.statement: Unpaired domain-to-domain translation is a highly powerful capability for AI.
principles.rationale: Collecting matched pairs of data across domains is expensive and time-consuming, whereas passively collecting independent data in separate domains is much easier.
principles.source_quote: That’s very powerful because it can be easy to passively collect data in each domain, but it’s time-consuming and expensive to get data that matches up across domains.

mental_models.name: Core Technology Leverage
mental_models.description: Evaluating the potential impact of a career or project by whether it builds foundational tools (high leverage) or solves isolated, domain-specific problems (low leverage).
mental_models.example: Switching from premed to computer science and machine learning in order to impact medicine and other fields simultaneously through core technology.

heuristics: Work on the core technology, not the applications.

signature_quotes.text: I realized that would be a faster path to impact more things than working on specific medical applications one at a time.
signature_quotes.context: Explaining his decision to switch from premed to studying machine learning.

signature_quotes.text: [I am] someone who works on the core technology, not the applications.
signature_quotes.context: Describing his professional identity and focus.

signature_quotes.text: That’s very powerful because it can be easy to passively collect data in each domain, but it’s time-consuming and expensive to get data that matches up across domains.
signature_quotes.context: Discussing the value of domain-to-domain translation models like CycleGAN.

anti_patterns.description: Depending exclusively on matched pairs of data for cross-domain machine learning tasks.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: Getting data that perfectly matches up across domains is time-consuming and expensive compared to passively collecting unpaired data.
